title: YouTube Channel Setup
description: International/diaspora audience. SEO-driven discoverability. English or bilingual content.

tasks.text: Create YouTube channel with consistent branding
Design channel banner, icon, and trailer video
Set up playlists: Puzzles, Full Games, Tutorials, Series
Research keywords: xiangqi tutorial, Chinese chess beginner, 象棋 (use vidIQ or TubeBuddy)
Publish first 5 videos with SEO-optimized titles (under 60 chars)
Create 3 thumbnail variants per video, use A/B Test & Compare
Reach 1K subscribers + 4K watch hours (YouTube Partner Program)
Set up YouTube Shorts repurposing from Douyin content
Enable memberships and Super Chat when eligible
